user.name: Peter H. Diamandis, MD
user.description: Exec. Chairman @XPRIZE @fountainlife_hq (and others) Working to extend human healthspan. Curator @Abundance360

fullText:
We're satiating human desire sooner than later.

Elon: Basically AI and robots are going to make so much stuff and provide so many services that they will actually run out of things to do for the humans. 

They'll just run out of things to do for the humans and  you know, there's there's only so much that humans can even express that they want. 

So you go back to my example, like if you go a million times the Earth's economy, you've long since saturated all human desire."

user.name: François Chollet
user.description: Co-founder @ndea. Co-founder @arcprize. Creator of Keras and ARC-AGI. Author of 'Deep Learning with Python'.

fullText:
Market efficiency is a myth. Markets are made of people, who are irrational both individually and in aggregate.

Maybe if human irrationality were completely random, it might average out to a rational whole. But in practice individual irrationality is driven by globally shared irrational narratives -- almost everybody is an irrational conformist.

user.name: LangChain
user.description: Powering the Agent Development Lifecycle. Makers of LangSmith and @LangChain_OSS and @LangChain_JS.

fullText:
Most teams building today have traces, what they don't have is a system for continuously improving their agents.

The teams that do use an agent development lifecycle: build, test, deploy, and monitor.

The problem with this lifecycle? It scales at the speed of their engineers. https://t.co/YlXt3BRrQ2

user.name: Together AI
user.description: Accelerate inference, model shaping, and pre-training on a research-optimized platform.

fullText:
LLMs write fast single-GPU kernels. Ask for a multi-GPU one and they fall apart.

ParallelKernelBench measures how they fail by benchmarking against 87 problems pulled from real codebases including Megatron-LM, DeepSpeed, DeepEP, TensorRT-LLM, NeMo-RL.

New research from Willy Chan @asplencmnt @simonguozirui @simran_s_arora and @realDanFu

fullText:

We now build 10x as much with 1/10 the people, very little SAAS spend required.

fullText:
some scenes from the @hud_evals × @ycombinator Frontier RL Environments Hackathon over the weekend.

24 intense, collaborative hours with 200 of the top builders in the world turning browser-use, robotics, logistics, and worldsims into environments where models can actually learn from.

a few highlights built with MiniMax M3:

Tera — zero-token browser-use RL env, #3 overall
Warehouse AI — autonomous warehouse robot fleet coordination
Atomz — Mars construction rovers in simulation

project videos in the comments.

user.name: OpenAI Developers
user.description: Official updates for developers building with Codex & the OpenAI Platform • Service status: https://t.co/kZwnwdYYEq

fullText:
Over the past six months, we shipped 30+ models, features, and upgraded tools for the API.

Our changelog has been busy. Here’s what you may have missed for the API:

New models
• GPT-5.5
• GPT-5.4 mini
• GPT-5.4 nano
• GPT-Realtime-2
• GPT-Realtime-Whisper
• GPT-Realtime-Translate
• GPT-Image-2

Agent building blocks
• Agents SDK harness & sandbox
• Skills in the Responses API
• Server-side compaction
• WebSocket mode
• Hosted shell

More ways to build
• Admin API enhancements
• OpenAI CLI
• Models on Amazon Bedrock
